steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage states stellar nurseries “cannot be touched.” This single phrase reveals the quality in the blank: the formations are intangible—physically inaccessible.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: Intangible (unable to be touched or grasped physically) solves the blank—the models make the completely intangible nurseries tangible and interactive. Repeatable, explicable, and regrettable don't address physical accessibility. That confirms D is correct.
